sentence: 这款手机的显示屏非常清晰。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī de xiǎnshìpíng fēicháng qīngxī.
english: The display screen on this phone is very clear.

sentence: 在太阳下看手机，需要调高亮度。
pinyin: Zài tàiyáng xià kàn shǒujī, xūyào tiáo gāo liàngdù.
english: You need to increase the brightness to use your phone in sunlight.

sentence: 多吃蔬菜有助于保持肠道健康。
pinyin: Duō chī shūcài yǒu zhù yú bǎochí chángdào jiànkāng.
english: Eating more vegetables helps maintain gut health.

sentence: 演唱会现场部署了大量警力维持秩序。
pinyin: Yǎnchànghhuì xiànchǎng bùshǔ le dàliàng jǐnglì wéichí zhìxù.
english: A large police force was deployed at the concert venue to maintain order.

sentence: 他在银行开了一个新的储蓄户头。
pinyin: Tā zài yínháng kāi le yī gè xīn de chǔxù hùtóu.
english: He opened a new savings account at the bank.
